---
title: '2014/06/08 Sunday Journal - Going Green Day Two!'
date: '2014-06-08T14:53:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '472043365950128917'
blogger_filename: '/2014/06/20140608-sunday-journal-going-green-day.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Journal'
---

<br />
I've been inspired by Dr John Gray, PhD&nbsp;<a href="http://www.marsvenus.com/p/mars-venus-diet-and-exercise-hardcover" target="_blank">http://www.marsvenus.com/p/mars-venus-diet-and-exercise-hardcover</a>. He spoke of Dopamine and Serotonin deficiencies, and how poor health was a major contributor. He talked about juice fasting, and other things to help detox the body and jump start health.<br />
<br />
Then there were these other booklets by some lady who suggested I put coffee in my butt... yuck... but she talked about juice fasting as well.<br />
<br />
Both Cross and Gray spoke of how radically different their bodies, health, and mind were after re-booting their system.<br />
<br />
As I've been praying the last few months, off and on, I've been noticing how food seems to have me in a grip... even taking extra gas money to buy things from the convenience store, or drinking way too much Dr. Pepper.<br />
<br />
God already started working in me to will and to do His good pleasure, because Dr. Pepper has started to taste less and less enjoyable over the last few months.<br />
<br />
And so Friday night Flavia and I were looking through Hulu shows and came across one that's been reccomended by many people to me, but I've never taken the time to watch it.<br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
<span style="background-color: white; color: #37404e; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'lucida grande', tahoma, verdana, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px;">If you are tired of being Fat, Sick, Nearly Dead... you NEED to watch this documentary! I'm inspired!&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.hulu.com/watch/289122" rel="nofollow nofollow" style="background-color: white; color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'lucida grande', tahoma, verdana, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">http://www.hulu.com/watch/289122</a><a class="" data-reactid=".2b.1:3:1:$comment10202800582953269_10202800590473457:0.0.$right.0.$left.0.0.1:$comment-body.0.$range0:0" dir="ltr" href="http://www.rebootwithjoe.com/rebooting/" rel="nofollow" style="background-color: #fafbfb; color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'lucida grande', tahoma, verdana, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; line-height: 15.359999656677246px;" target="_blank">http://www.rebootwithjoe.com/rebooting/</a></blockquote>
<br />
Well, Joe cross is overweight and his body is starting to break down mysteriously. So he goes on a 60 day juice only fast. Resetting his entire body. But not juice from the store that is only 10% real juice. Rather, he juices his own fruits and veggies and drinks these and only these for 60 days! He looses a lot of weight, has more energy, and his mysterious illness goes away. Then he duplicates the results in another man just like himself but worse off!<br />
<br />
Flavia just got off of a three week healthier eating kick, so we decided to do this together...<br />
<br />
I don't know that we'll go 60 days, or even 30... but a good re-boot is definitely needed!<br />
<br />
The first three days is the worst because the body is starting to detox. Just so happens I'm off work three days so this is now day two. Either I'm supernaturally doing better, and/or it's not the same for me because we're not just doing juice, were blending.<br />
<br />
Since I cannot take time off of work for a lengthy period I can't afford to be out of it for a week, so I'm doing a blended fruits and veggies diet instead. Still gets micro nutrients in, but it increase my fiber intake as well, which he said wasn't as good for the reboot. Nevertheless... I imagine the blended whole food is still better than what I've been eating, and I imagine a major up-tick in health.<br />
<br />
We're doing this from Saturday 06/07/14 to Saturday 06/14/14. Maybe more, we'll see how it's going by then. Today is 06/08/2014 and I weigh 190 Lbs. That's good, because at my Doctors Apt in Jan/Feb I weighed 205 Lbs.<br />
<br />
I have a never ending headache. Tightness in my neck joints rolls into my head and even up into behind my eyes. The only thing that keeps it down is a constant supply of Tylenol and Ibuprofen. I've taken it nearly daily for two years. It's begun to affect my liver function and enzymes much the same way Alcohol would have affected me had I stayed an Alcoholic.<br />
<br />
I'm nearly always tired, depressed, and non-motivated. I have ideas about the blog but I'd rather just sit and watch TV. I'm easily irritated at Flavia and the Kids. Dr Gray says that all of this is much more related to low dopamine than ill will. Most men in America are dopamine deficient and they find home life particularly challenging. They will go to work and feel good, but come home to "routine" and dopamine drops and they feel foggy, tired, and irritable. This is why so many men leave their homes. They are in poor health and don't even know it.<br />
<br />
It also explains why I want to love my family at one moment, even glad for their presence, and then feel pressure from them and want them gone in the next moment. It explains the job hopping. New +&nbsp;Challenge = Rise in dopamine to meet the challenge. Routine&nbsp;+ Comfortable = Drop in dopamine resulting in a sense of fogginess and lower performance.<br />
<br />
This is why the law of diminishing returns was in effect at WF Sales. The harder I would try not to be on the in trouble list, the more often I was on it.<br />
<br />
This is a warning. As much as I enjoy my new job now, I'm prone to fall into the same patter unless I change some things. This new job should be easier longer, because it's far more in my wheel house of talents and gifting. But I can already see the fog over everyones else's eyes that works there. I need to raise my health if I'm going to succeed long term there, or create passive income and leave there... either way.<br />
<br />
<br />
SO, it's time to get healthy, really healthy!<br />
<br />
<br />
To Repeat:<br />
<br />
We're doing this from Saturday 06/07/2014 to Saturday 06/14/14. Maybe more, we'll see how it's going by then.<br />
<br />
Today is 06/08/2014 and I weigh 190 Lbs. I'll weigh again on Saturday 06/14/2014.<br />
<br />
We'll see where things go from there. Enough is enough, it's time for new.<br />
<br />
<br />
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/darrell-g-wolfe-and-190lbs-06-08-14-b8846600b6a6.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/darrell-g-wolfe-and-190lbs-06-08-14-b8846600b6a6.jpg" height="320" width="240" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Darrell G Wolfe 190 LBS 06/08/14</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<br />
<br />
<br />
DW<br />
<br />
<br />
